title: dentaria rotundifolia
intro: Dentaria rotundifolia, also known as round-toothed toothwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Dentaria rotundifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, or used in salves and ointments to apply its topical benefits.
